title: Cock and Bull
overview: When a murder occurs in a small town in Southeast China, a local mechanic, known for his honesty, comes under suspicion.  When the police target him to take the fall, he’s forced to try and exonerate himself, uncovering a number of disturbing facts, most much bigger than the initial crime.

trailers.title: COCK AND BULL 《追凶者也》 Opens September 16th in the US & Canada!
